# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: main
jobs:
  artifact-builder:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Generate Artifact
        id: gen-artifact
        run: echo "::set-output name=version::$(date +'%Y%m%d_%H%M')"
        shell: bash
      - name: Archive Artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v1.0.2
        with:
          name: artifact-output-${version}
          path: |
            src
            artifact.txt
    outputs:
      artifact_name: ${{ steps.gen-artifact.outputs.version }}
  deployer-job:
    needs: artifact-builder
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment:
      CIRCLE_TEST: true
    strategy:
      matrix:
        platform: ["iOS", "Android"]

    steps:
      - name: Download Artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v1.0.2
        with:
          artifactName: artifact-output-20210715_1439

      - name: Deploy to ${{ matrix.platform }}
        run: |
          echo "Deploying to ${{matrix.platform}}"
          echo "Version is ${env.CIRCLE_TEST}"
<>
